name: Di Renjie

skills.name: Swift Justice
skills.description: Each Basic Attack stacks Swift Justice (up to 5 stacks), with each stack increasing his Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

skills.name: Respect the Law
skills.description:
Throws tokens in a cone-shaped area, dealing physical damage and magical damage.
Passive: After every two Basic Attacks, the next Basic Attack gains a random enhanced effect.

skills.name: Legal Immunity
skills.description: Throws tokens to damage nearby enemies. Removes debuffs from himself and gains brief invincibility.

skills.name: Imperial Order
skills.description: Throws a token in the target direction, damaging, stunning, and reducing the Physical and Magical Defense of the first enemy hero hit.

skillsZh.name: 迅捷
skillsZh.description: 每次普攻為自己疊層(最多5層)，每層獲得額外攻速和移動速度提升。

skillsZh.name: 六令追凶
skillsZh.description:
向指定扇形區域發射令牌，對敵人造成物理傷害和法術傷害。
被動：每兩次普攻後，下次普攻獲得隨機強化效果。

skillsZh.name: 公理庇佑
skillsZh.description: 向周圍擲出令牌，對敵人造成傷害，同時解除自身負面效果並短暫無敵。

skillsZh.name: 王朝密令
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射令牌，對命中的第一個敵方英雄造成傷害和暈眩效果，並降低其物理防禦和法術防禦。

tips: Di Renjie (Marksman): Tier A — 51.14% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday.
tipsZh: 狄仁傑（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 51.14%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：急速戰靴、閃電匕首、末世.

patchHistory.detail: Changed the stat-based calculation of the tokens' damage, so Di Renjie is no longer limited to attack effect equipment, but can try out other   builds.

patchHistory.change: Increased base Movement Speed and the early game damage of Skill 1's tokens.
patchHistory.detail: "Magistrate Di has been lying low for a while, it's time for him to bring judgment to his opponents."

patchHistory.change: Reduced the base damage of Skills 1 and 2, but kept the same basic damage as before at max level.
patchHistory.detail: Di Renjie deals high burst damage in melee range with Skills 1 and 2, and is able to poke enemies from afar with his Basic Attacks. These two characterisics made him very powerful at laning during early game, even before he's all geared up. Considering that he's a solid hero during mid to late game, we want Di Renjie to be less punishing during early game.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「調整令牌的屬性加成結構，讓狄大人不再與攻擊特效套裝綁定，可以嘗試更多的出裝選擇。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升基礎移速和1技能令牌前期傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「狄大人已經蟄伏一段時間了，是時候去審判他的對手了。」

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the base damage of Skills 1 and 2, but kept the same basic damage as before at max level.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Di Renjie deals high burst damage in melee range with Skills 1 and 2, and is able to poke enemies from afar with his Basic Attacks. These two characterisics made him very powerful at laning during early game, even before he's all geared up. Considering that he's a solid hero during mid to late game, we want Di Renjie to be less punishing during early game.

faqs.question: Is Di Renjie good in current season?
faqs.answer: Di Renjie is Tier A Marksman with 51.14% win rate, 0.77% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Di Renjie build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday, Deepfrost Siege, Blood Rage, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Di Renjie?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Ukyo Tachibana, Ying.

faqsZh.question: 狄仁傑 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 狄仁傑 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.14%、選取 0.77%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 狄仁傑 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：急速戰靴、閃電匕首、末世、寒霜襲侵、血魔之怒、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 狄仁傑？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Kaizer、Dun、Arthur。狄仁傑 克制 Mai Shiranui、Ukyo Tachibana、Ying。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Ukyo Tachibana, Ying. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.

guide.overview: Di Renjie is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Di Renjie: Basic atacks add stacks,with each stack granting extra atack speed and movement speed.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Doomsday, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Ominous Premonition, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Di Renjie's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Respect the Law → Legal Immunity → Imperial Order → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Imperial Order (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Respect the Law is your lane trade tool. Legal Immunity second. Imperial Order whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Respect the Law → Legal Immunity → Imperial Order → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Di Renjie is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
comparisons: Di Renjie vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Di Renjie has +2.4% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Di Renjie when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Di Renjie vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Di Renjie has +1.6% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Di Renjie when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Di Renjie excels into Mai Shiranui, Ukyo Tachibana, Ying. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.
